name: Literature
preprompt: You are the literature component. You curate relevant papers, extract the claims and evidence that bear on the project's hypotheses, and surface conflicts.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. External: citation manager (placeholder). Write: own data only.
summary: Three key references on Pilbara hydrothermal alteration; one regional metamorphism review; two methodology papers on chlorite thermobarometry.

toc.title: Kiyokawa et al. 2012 — Pilbara seafloor hydrothermal sequences
toc.descriptor: Closest published analogue for our locality.

toc.title: Vidal et al. 2006 — Chlorite thermobarometry
toc.descriptor: Methodology backbone for the EMPA-T derivation.
